name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Interface Blueprint Validation Policy
governing_principle: A blueprint must be validated before it can guide design.
identity_principle: The interface identity must prove that Hoax.ai is not a detector before any prototype exists.
validation_scope: Non-operational validation of Sprint 31 interface blueprint governance, conceptual identity, and integrity without interface or prototype creation.
correction_policy: Corrections cannot add interface files, prototype files, routes, sitemap URLs, tool language, classifier language, upload language, scoring, public CTAs, public claims, or implementation code.

non_authorization_rules.statement: Interface blueprint validation does not authorize interface implementation, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or public tool behavior.
